title: Onix mulfordiae
intro: Onix or Onix mulfordiae, also known as Mexican prickle poppy or Mexican prickly poppy, is a species of flowering plant in the family Papaveraceae. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, with its extracts exhibiting anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of fever, colds, and respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of Onix mulfordiae include alkaloids, flavonoids, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The plant is commonly used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being incorporated into topical ointments and creams to treat skin issues and wounds.
